name: Dak's Ellen's Favorite Oat Bran Muffin Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Better for Bread white flour
1 cn 8.25-oz can Libby's Lite Peaches, drained
1 tb Drained peach juice from canned peaches
2 tb Raisins, warmed for 10 seconds in microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the machine's browning control to light.
2. Put all the ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting and push the start button.
